Game.Name: Sonic The Hedgehog 4 (World) (Unl) (Pirate) [b]
Game.plot: Probably one of the more famous pirates in existance, this hack of Speedy Gonzales featured Sonic the Hedgehog collecting rings, and in a strange turn of events, saving Mario. This pirate has been found in Hong Kong and Brazil.http://www.snescentral.com/article.php?id=0816
